title: Pteroceras loratum
taxonomy: Pteroceras loratum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. This classification places Pteroceras loratum within the order Asparagales, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants. Pteroceras loratum is further classified as a genus within the subfamily Vanilleae, which is a group of orchids known for their climbing habits and showy flowers. The species Pteroceras loratum is native to tropical regions of Africa and is often found in dense forests and woodland areas. Its classification reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary relationships within the orchid family.
